Summary: Scope & Architecture Lock
Description: Freeze the MVP scope so delivery stays narrow: single-tenant, EU-only, Sumsub-only, devnet-only, one report type, and no live bank rails.

Summary: Refresh README and setup notes to match the current build-verified environment
Description: Update project documentation so the repo, environment, and current build state are accurate for contributors and pilot stakeholders.

Summary: Write architecture decisions for single-tenant, EU-only, Sumsub-only, and devnet-only MVP scope
Description: Create short ADRs that explicitly lock the MVP operating model and cut out non-MVP scope.

Summary: Define role model and workflow states for entities, wallets, cases, and reports
Description: Specify the allowed states and actor permissions before implementation begins.

Summary: Finalize pilot scope, hard cut line, and launch metrics
Description: Turn the MVP plan into an agreed pilot contract with explicit no-go items and measurable success criteria.

Summary: Platform Foundation
Description: Add the persistence, queueing, config, and CI base needed for a real application instead of a scaffold.

Summary: Select persistence module and add migrations
Description: Choose the persistence approach and implement schema migration tooling that runs on fresh environments.

Summary: Create core schema for users, entities, wallets, cases, reports, webhooks, and audit events
Description: Implement the initial relational data model required for the pilot workflow.

Summary: Add Redis queue, config validation, and structured logging
Description: Introduce background job support and consistent runtime validation/logging across services.

Summary: Add CI pipeline for typecheck, build, migrations, and test jobs
Description: Establish a CI baseline so the codebase can be reviewed and deployed with confidence.

Summary: Auth, RBAC & Audit
Description: Protect approvals and create evidence for every privileged action in the MVP.

Summary: Implement user and session model
Description: Add persistent user identities, roles, and sessions suitable for an institutional pilot.

Summary: Add login and token lifecycle endpoints
Description: Implement the authentication path for dashboard and API access.

Summary: Add RBAC guards for admin, compliance officer, and auditor actions
Description: Enforce authorization at route and service levels for all pilot-critical actions.

Summary: Add immutable audit event service and middleware
Description: Record who did what, when, and with what before/after state across critical workflows.

Summary: Entity Onboarding & KYC
Description: Allow one institutional customer to onboard a legal entity and complete KYC via Sumsub sandbox.

Summary: Build entity CRUD and onboarding workflow API
Description: Create the entity service endpoints and states needed for draft-to-approval progression.

Summary: Implement Sumsub applicant creation in sandbox
Description: Wire the KYC service to create applicants and capture provider references in the database.

Summary: Implement webhook verification, idempotency, and entity status sync
Description: Ingest Sumsub callbacks safely and update entity/KYC state without duplicate processing.

Summary: Build dashboard KYC review and evidence screens
Description: Expose onboarding, provider state, and approval actions to compliance users.

Summary: Wallet Governance & Solana Sync
Description: Move approved wallets through review and sync the allowlist decision to Solana devnet.

Summary: Build wallet request and approval workflow
Description: Add the wallet lifecycle with entity approval prerequisite and compliance approval actions.

Summary: Replace placeholder program IDs and add whitelist program tests
Description: Remove placeholder Solana IDs and add deterministic tests for wallet whitelist instructions.

Summary: Turn dry-run whitelist sync into real devnet transaction submission
Description: Make wallet approvals create a real devnet instruction and capture the resulting signature.

Summary: Add wallet operations screens and tx signature visibility
Description: Add the operator-facing wallet views with approval status, risk notes, and chain sync evidence.

Summary: Transaction Review & Reporting
Description: Create the manual review loop that makes the platform useful as a compliance control plane.

Summary: Build transaction case model and queue API
Description: Implement the persistence and API surface for transaction review cases.

Summary: Implement baseline rules for amount, high-risk entity, and manual review triggers
Description: Add the first narrow rules engine to open review cases when transactions cross pilot thresholds.

Summary: Add case actions approve, reject, and escalate with notes and evidence
Description: Allow compliance officers to resolve cases and preserve rationale.

Summary: Build monthly MiCA report export and report history
Description: Generate one monthly operational report from pilot data and make it downloadable.

Summary: Pilot Hardening & Release
Description: Move from local proof-of-concept to something a design partner can actually use in staging.

Summary: Add Dockerfiles and local orchestration
Description: Package the services so the full stack can run consistently outside a single developer laptop.

Summary: Add staging deployment, secrets handling, and health checks
Description: Create a repeatable staging deployment with environment-managed secrets and operational probes.

Summary: Add monitoring, alerting, backups, and incident runbook
Description: Put basic operational protection around the pilot environment.

Summary: Execute UAT, pilot checklist, and go-no-go review
Description: Run the end-to-end pilot workflow and document open issues before customer exposure.

Summary: UX & Operator Productivity
Description: Use feedback from the MVP to make the system faster and easier for real operators.

Summary: Port the best TreasuryOS2 layouts into real dashboard screens
Description: Reuse the strongest UI patterns from TreasuryOS2 on top of live data flows.

Summary: Add advanced search, filtering, and saved views
Description: Improve operator productivity for larger volumes of entities, wallets, and cases.

Summary: Add bulk actions for approvals and report operations
Description: Support controlled batch actions where a pilot customer needs efficiency.

Summary: Add in-app notifications and operator inbox
Description: Provide a central place for new cases, failed syncs, and review reminders.

Summary: Integration Expansion
Description: Broaden the product beyond the single-provider MVP while staying in sandbox or pre-production mode.

Summary: Add Jumio as a secondary KYC provider
Description: Introduce a second KYC path so the product is less dependent on one provider.

Summary: Integrate AMINA sandbox workflows
Description: Validate the bank adapter against sandbox assumptions before any production rail work.

Summary: Add SWIFT mock and ISO 20022 validation workflow
Description: Model outbound payment preparation with stronger message validation before real SWIFT work.

Summary: Add sanctions provider abstraction layer
Description: Prepare the compliance engine for provider-backed sanctions and screening integrations.

Summary: Automation & Workflow Operations
Description: Reduce manual operational load while preserving control and auditability.

Summary: Add SLA timers and escalation rules
Description: Track review deadlines and highlight stale cases or pending approvals.

Summary: Automate case creation from risk events and workflow triggers
Description: Create cases automatically from system events rather than only manual operator action.

Summary: Add webhook retries and reconciliation dashboard
Description: Make provider failures visible and recoverable without shell access.

Summary: Add scheduled report jobs and recurring exports
Description: Turn reporting into a recurring operational process for pilot customers.

Summary: Org & Tenant Readiness
Description: Prepare the platform for more than one customer without yet going fully self-serve SaaS.

Summary: Add organization settings and environment configuration UI
Description: Allow a pilot customer to manage settings without code changes.

Summary: Implement tenant isolation at the data layer for pilot tenants
Description: Partition data cleanly enough to support a controlled beta with multiple customers.

Summary: Add service accounts and API keys for machine-to-machine access
Description: Support integrations without forcing human login flows for all system actions.

Summary: Create customer and auditor export package
Description: Package audit logs and evidence references into something reviewable outside the product.

Summary: Security & Beta Reliability
Description: Increase system confidence before committing to a broader rollout.

Summary: Add tracing and richer operational dashboards
Description: Improve observability from basic logs to request and job-level tracing.

Summary: Add secret rotation and dependency supply-chain scanning
Description: Reduce operational and security risk in a beta environment.

Summary: Run penetration test or external review and remediate findings
Description: Bring in an outside view before expanding customer exposure.

Summary: Add beta KPI dashboard with workflow metrics
Description: Make beta operating performance visible to founders and pilot customers.

Summary: Beta Program Operations
Description: Run the beta like a managed program rather than ad hoc customer support.

Summary: Create beta onboarding kit and admin playbook
Description: Package setup, roles, workflows, and support expectations for beta customers.

Summary: Build feedback triage workflow linked to backlog
Description: Systematize customer feedback so product changes can be ranked and tracked.

Summary: Add release notes and changelog process
Description: Create a consistent communication pattern for beta changes.

Summary: Run beta exit review and decide GA scope
Description: Use evidence from beta to define what must be true before a real app launch.

Summary: Multi-Tenant SaaS Foundation
Description: Turn the pilot/beta platform into a scalable product architecture for multiple customers.

Summary: Implement tenant-aware auth and data scoping
Description: Make every request, approval, and query tenant-aware across the full stack.

Summary: Add self-serve organization provisioning
Description: Allow new customers to provision their organization without engineering intervention.

Summary: Add usage metering and plan enforcement
Description: Track product usage for pricing, quotas, and account governance.

Summary: Add customer admin settings and delegated access controls
Description: Support real customer operations teams with more complete administrative tooling.

Summary: Production Treasury Rails
Description: Move from sandboxed and simulated rails to live treasury operations.

Summary: Integrate live AMINA banking flows
Description: Promote the bank adapter from sandbox experimentation to production-grade integration.

Summary: Integrate live SWIFT settlement flows
Description: Add production-grade SWIFT connectivity and message processing.

Summary: Implement custody, HSM, or KMS signing strategy
Description: Formalize secure key management for sensitive transaction operations.

Summary: Build payment reconciliation engine
Description: Track treasury movement outcomes and reconcile internal state with external rails.

Summary: Compliance Network Expansion
Description: Expand beyond the narrow MVP jurisdiction and compliance controls.

Summary: Integrate Travel Rule network partner
Description: Support regulated travel rule data exchange for relevant transfers.

Summary: Automate sanctions screening and list refresh
Description: Move from basic/manual controls to provider-backed screening operations.

Summary: Add jurisdiction rule packs for EU, CH, UAE, and US
Description: Represent real market expansion in configurable rule packages.

Summary: Add data retention, deletion, and residency controls
Description: Prepare the system for real compliance and privacy obligations across markets.

Summary: Security & Governance
Description: Raise the platform to enterprise security and governance expectations.

Summary: Run external smart contract audit and remediate findings
Description: Subject on-chain programs to formal external review before significant production use.

Summary: Run infrastructure and application security audit
Description: Review the off-chain system with external or dedicated internal security effort.

Summary: Implement multisig and upgrade governance for programs and admin actions
Description: Reduce single-key and single-actor risk for critical changes.

Summary: Run disaster recovery and incident response drills
Description: Validate that the team can recover the platform under stress.

Summary: Commercialization & Customer Operations
Description: Move from founder-led pilot selling to a repeatable commercial product motion.

Summary: Implement pricing, billing, and invoicing
Description: Support real contracts and monetization with product-backed billing data.

Summary: Build contract and compliance document packs
Description: Package security, legal, and compliance materials required in enterprise sales cycles.

Summary: Establish customer support SLA and customer success operations
Description: Move support from ad hoc founder work to an operating model.

Summary: Create customer onboarding portal and guided setup
Description: Reduce time to value for new customers joining the platform.

Summary: Production Launch Operations
Description: Create the operational discipline required for a real application launch.

Summary: Harden production environment and networking
Description: Move from beta-grade infrastructure to production-grade architecture and controls.

Summary: Establish SLO, SLA, on-call, and error budgets
Description: Define what reliable service means and how the team will operate it.

Summary: Build release train and change management process
Description: Create predictable release cadence and governance around production changes.

Summary: Run final launch readiness review
Description: Make the decision to market the product as a real application based on evidence.
